description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named sonarcloud scan that runs on push to master and dev branches and on pull request open, synchronize, and reopen events. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up JDK 11, downloads and sets up sonar-scanner and build-wrapper, prepares a cfamily cache timestamp, caches cfamily and conan files, installs dependencies, configures the build, runs the build-wrapper, tests, generates coverage, runs sonar-scanner, and cleans Conan packages.
